work_unit: SH-SIDE-L-001 real fix — handleDeleteText/onDeleteItem idx→id (replaces phantom commit 4372504)
situation: audit-cycle-state listed SH-SIDE-L-001 as pending with fix_case_id=case-2026-07-08-003, but that case file never existed. Prior worktree opt-sidepanel-id-delete-1783378486 commit 4372504 was empty (.opt-lock only, no source change). Bug still live on main: handleDeleteText(idx:number) uses array index for deletion, inconsistent with SH-M-005 id-based deletedStack (58c71ec). When two VerifiedText entries share identical text+bbox but different ids, index-based delete can remove the wrong entry after re-sort/filter.
action: Removed phantom worktree+branch. Created fresh worktree opt-sidepanel-id-delete-fix-1783378817. Applied real fix across 2 files: (1) SidePanelApp.tsx handleDeleteText signature idx:number→id:string, lookup via .find(t=>t.id===id), filter via t.id!==id; ImageWithOverlay onDeleteText prop signature updated, call site passes t.id not i. (2) ResultPanel.tsx onDeleteItem prop signature idx:number→id:string, call site passes item.id not i. Committed e5e9af4, pushed to origin.
outcome_evidence: Commit e5e9af4 on auto/opt-sidepanel-id-delete-fix-1783378817 pushed to origin. git diff --cached shows 2 files changed, 7 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-). Pre-existing build error (storage.ts:44 Unexpected export) confirmed identical on main — not introduced by this fix.
